sql_array: CREATE TABLE tuples_test (`data` Tuple(name String, age Int32)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT data.name, data.age FROM tuples_test WHERE data.age > 28;
UPDATE tuples_test SET data = tuple('Charlie', 35) WHERE data.name = 'Bob';
SELECT tupleElement(data, 1) AS name FROM tuples_test WHERE tupleElement(data, 2) < 40;
